mini_task_spec: Using the `filelist` brick's `glob` tool, find all files matching the pattern `**/*.decorator.ts` rooted at the `test-repo/packages` directory (absolute path: `/tmp/focus-bench/filelist-native-2026-04-24T06-41-52-864/test-repo/packages`). List every matching file path (relative to the session working directory `/tmp/focus-bench/filelist-native-2026-04-24T06-41-52-864/`), one per line, sorted alphabetically. The expected answer format is a plain list of relative file paths, one per line, sorted alphabetically (ascending).
